violations.text: Working containers of sauces are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
A light was observed non-functional under the hood at the time of this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC directed staff to dispose ice. Beverage ice was obtained from neighboring establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

Establishment is using time for holding hot chicken without a approval. Per PIC, chicken is cooked (fried) and held for no longer than 30 minutes before being reheated in frier or discarded. Application and log provided to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, chicken was placed hot in the walk-in in covered plastic containers greater than four inches deep. PIC placed chicken in shallow metal pan and returned to walk-in. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Working containers of sauces are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. PIC labeled during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
The walk-in cooler is in poor repair, observed with condensate dripping into a container. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
A light was observed non-functional under the grill hood. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Provided site with state guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
The storage cabinets located in the counter area were observed in poor repair. Doors falling off, interior wood is delaminating, composite wood exposed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2023
Coving by 3 bay sink was observed in poor repair. Bottom panel underneath freezer door was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023
One light bulb under kitchen hood and light bulb in walk-in freezer were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023
